rejects_out_of_scope_agentic_engineering.description: Agent must reject tasks outside the scope of agentic engineering — prompt authoring, agent harness design, event-loop construction, sub-agent profile authoring, tool wrapper design, MCP integration, or plane separation
rejects_out_of_scope_agentic_engineering.observable_check: execution_log contains rejection AND query does not involve prompt authoring, harness design, event-loop construction, sub-agent profiles, tool wrappers, MCP integration, or plane separation

rejects_green_without_red.description: Agent must reject green-phase or refactor-phase implementation requests without existing failing red tests or explicit evaluation rubric
rejects_green_without_red.observable_check: execution_log contains rejection AND query requests green/refactor implementation AND no failing red tests AND no evaluation rubric exist

rejects_prose_only_critical_enforcement.description: Agent must reject tasks requesting critical behaviors enforced in prose alone when code enforcement is the only viable option
rejects_prose_only_critical_enforcement.observable_check: execution_log contains rejection AND query requests permission, schema, routing, termination, or safety rules only in prose without code enforcement

returns_explicit_rejection_statement.description: Agent must return an explicit Rejection statement at the top of the response
returns_explicit_rejection_statement.observable_check: execution_log contains 'REJECTION' or explicit refusal statement at response start

identifies_suggested_archetype.description: Agent must identify the suggested archetype for out-of-scope tasks
identifies_suggested_archetype.observable_check: execution_log contains suggested archetype name (e.g., BACKEND_DEVELOPER for harness code, TEST_ENGINEER for behavioral tests) for out-of-lane tasks

confirms_no_modifications.description: Agent must confirm explicitly that no agent code, prompts, harness files, or workspace files were modified
confirms_no_modifications.observable_check: execution_log contains explicit confirmation that no files were modified

does_not_begin_before_checklist_passes.description: Agent must not begin prompt authoring, harness design, or event-loop construction before dispatch brief passes acceptance checklist
does_not_begin_before_checklist_passes.observable_check: execution_log does not contain file edits or implementation before acceptance checklist passes

does_not_enforce_critical_in_prose.description: Agent must not enforce critical behaviors (permissions, schemas, routing, termination, safety) in prose alone when code enforcement is viable
does_not_enforce_critical_in_prose.observable_check: execution_log does not contain permission, schema, routing, or termination rules only in prose without code enforcement

does_not_accept_unbounded_recursion.description: Agent must not accept unbounded recursion, undefined termination, or permissive default tool access
does_not_accept_unbounded_recursion.observable_check: execution_log does not contain agent designs with unbounded loops, undefined termination, or all-tools-granted defaults
